title: Uruguayan Beef Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and savory stir fry made with Uruguayan beef and an array of ingredients, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the stir-fry sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional minute.
If using gooey cheese, sprinkle on top of the dish and cook until melted.
